Hybrid Classroom.    Meets at Workforce and Career Institute.  The cost of this course includes a $27 per credit hour course materials fee. Students are required to purchase the proper Personal Protective Equipment for the program. Prices vary based up size. Students will also be required to purchase NCCER tests at the cost of $24 per year.  Two hours of course instruction will be delivered online each week.
